parameters: Hah...! Hah...! H-hy...! Ugh! Nn, kuh...! N-no! Don't come any closer!
\SP[damage]\SE[10]...... Ah, ah...! N-no! Don't come any closer!!

\SE[10]Get up... I have to run...! If I just stand here...! I'll get eaten by the monster...
I don't want that...!
H-help...! I don't want to die! Someone...! O-onii-chan!
--------------脇から逃げようとするエリィ

...Ugh...... It hurts...... So much blood... I'm going to die...... ...Will I go to
where Papa and Mama are too......

\SE[8]Ah... but I... I don't even remember their faces...... ...I can't go to them like
this... I'll really be all alone......

\SE[12]...Why did I run away from home...? Just because I had a little fight with onii-chan
and that woman... I could have just apologized... Why did I... have to be so
stubborn......

\SE[13]...At least before I die, I want to apologize to onii-chan...... I don't care about
that gloomy girl...... But dying without making up with onii-chan... I don't want
that... I don't......
Hah...... Wh-where did you go, Elly-chaaan...!
skit fadeIn マナ t left
skit pose マナ t damage 5
Ah, there you are! Th-thank goodness...! Elly-chan, you're safe!

\SE[4]...! You...! Y-you idiot...! I told you to run away...! You'll get killed by the
monster too...! Mana!
skit pose マナ t damage2 11
You...! D-don't come any closer...! Ugh...! Elly-chan, hide behind me...!

\SE[7]You... gloomy idiot...! What did you come here for... with your legs shaking like
that...! Even if there's more of you, we'll just get eaten together...!

\SE[10]......Sigh... Hah...... C-calm down... I've been practicing, right...! This time,
I'll...!

\SE[2]......Th-thank goodness... I did it...! This time I could use my magic properly,
\n[1]...... Mama...!

\SE[8]......What is she... She defeated the monster just like that... This is a mage...
Even though she's a kid like me... she's completely different...

\SE[default]Phew...! It looks like there aren't any more monsters around...! A-ah... Are you
okay? Elly-cha────

A-are you okay!? Elly-chan!? I'll heal you right now...! U-um...! Please bear with
the pain a little longer...!

I'm sorry, just hold on a bit... H-heal...! *Cough*...! Ah... hah, hah......! O-one
more time...! Heal! P-please heal...!

\SE[10]...This girl... Why is she trying so desperately... I've been bullying you all this
time...... ugh...!

\SE[1]...The bleeding stopped...! O-okay! With this, you'll definitely be saved...! Hah...!
I-I'm so glad~...!
skit moveY マナ t -140 80 f

This girl... If you look closely, she's covered in dirt all over... Her skirt is
tattered, her legs are scraped up...... She ran here at full speed... all alone
through this forest......
skit moveY マナ t 0 80 f
\SE[10]...... Hey, why did you...... go this far for someone like me......?
W-why, that's...! It's obvious, because I wanted to save you, Elly-chan!
\SE[15]...Eh, b-but I... I've only ever done terrible things to you......

\SE[14]I-it's fine! Even if Elly-chan is... just a little uncomfortable with me... Even so,
I want you to live... ugh...!

\SE[13]I understand very well, just like Elly-chan, how sad it feels to have someone
precious taken by monsters... I don't want anyone to feel that way ever again...

\SE[14]\n[1] and Dario and the Village Chief and Grandma and everyone in the village... Of
course I like you too... Everyone loves your energetic, bright smile...!
完了までウェイト = false
skit pose マナ t damage 15
skit move マナ t right2

So please... don't disappear on your own...! We were all worried about you, geez...!
Ugh...! I'm so glad you're safe, Elly-chan...!
\SE[13]...Ugh......! W-waaah......! A-ahh......! I-I'm sorry...! I'm sorry, Mana-chan...!
完了までウェイト = false

All this time, I... thought of Mana-chan as an enemy. I thought she was a bad woman
trying to steal my brother...... ...I thought she was a thieving cat trying to steal
my place.

But I was wrong... Mana-chan was a kind, strong girl. The bad one was... me, the
idiot who fought and ran away from home without thinking.
完了までウェイト = true
